packages.name: linear-dev-cycle
packages.description: End-to-end development workflow driven by Linear tickets. Gathers context from Linear, Notion, and Figma, plans implementation with human approval, implements code, runs tests, verifies CI, and submits a GitLab merge request.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: pipeline-generator
packages.description: Generate high-quality pipelines from natural language descriptions. Analyzes requirements, designs architecture, generates YAML skeleton and system prompts in parallel, validates, and persists to disk.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: plan-then-execute
packages.description: Enforces brainstorm -> plan -> execute -> verify workflow. Design must be approved before implementation. All work verified before completion.
packages.author: workflow-control

packages.name: systematic-debugging-pipeline
packages.description: Enforces reproduce -> root-cause analysis -> fix -> verify flow. No code changes allowed until root cause is identified.
packages.author: workflow-control
